# General Requirements Quality Checklist: Photo Album Organizer

**Purpose**: Validates completeness, clarity, consistency, and coverage of the Photo Album Organizer requirements across all domains before implementation begins.
**Created**: 2026-06-09
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements. Focus: General / Full-Spec. Depth: Standard (self-review).

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are minimum and maximum album name length constraints explicitly specified beyond "non-empty"? [Gap, Spec §FR-003/FR-004]
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements defined for the default/fallback cover placeholder appearance when no photos exist? [Gap, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements specified for how album cards behave when the main page contains a large number of albums (e.g., 100+)? [Gap, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK004 Are requirements defined for handling unsupported browser environments where OPFS or sql.js WASM is unavailable? [Gap, Plan §Technical Context]
- [ ] CHK005 Are requirements specified for the photo thumbnail generation process (max dimensions, format, quality trade-offs)? [Gap, Spec §FR-007]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is "cover preview (first photo or placeholder)" explicitly defining what the placeholder looks like? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "smooth visual transition" in the drag-and-drop acceptance scenario quantified beyond referencing SC-003? [Ambiguity, Spec §US3 AC1]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "illustrated empty state" defined with measurable criteria for what constitutes an adequate illustration? [Ambiguity, Spec §US5 AC1]
- [ ] CHK009 Is "fully usable" in SC-007 defined with specific, measurable criteria per device class? [Clarity, Spec §SC-007]
- [ ] CHK010 Are the terms "smooth" and "jank" in SC-008 quantified with measurable frame-rate or response-time thresholds? [Clarity, Spec §SC-008]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 Do the spec's Key Entities (Album, Photo attributes) align with the data-model.md SQLite schema columns? [Consistency, Spec §Key Entities, Data Model]
- [ ] CHK012 Are drag-and-drop requirements consistent between FR-010/FR-011 and the contracts/modules.md drag-drop API surface? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010/FR-011, Contracts]
- [ ] CHK013 Is the photo sort order consistently described across FR-007, the clarifications section, and the Photo entity definition? [Consistency, Spec §FR-007, §Clarifications, §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK014 Do the task dependencies in tasks.md (US2 depends on US1) match the plan's stated independence of user stories? [Consistency, Tasks §Dependencies, Spec §User Stories]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK015 Can SC-001 ("under 30 seconds") be objectively and repeatably measured without implementation-specific tooling? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK016 Is SC-004 ("order persists when user refreshes") testable in isolation, or does it depend on SC-003 being implemented first? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK017 Can SC-007 ("fully usable on all screen sizes") be verified by a reviewer without access to physical devices? [Measurability, Spec §SC-007]
- [ ] CHK018 Is SC-009 ("90% of first-time users") measurable pre-launch, or is this a post-launch metric that should be deferred? [Measurability, Spec §SC-009]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK019 Are requirements defined for the scenario where a user adds a photo, then deletes the original file from disk before viewing the album again? [Coverage, Spec §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK020 Are requirements specified for concurrent operations — e.g., user deletes an album while another view is displaying its photos? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK021 Are requirements defined for browser tab close/refresh during an in-progress operation (photo add, album create, drag-and-drop)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK022 Are requirements specified for the scenario where OPFS storage quota is exceeded (beyond individual photo storage errors)? [Coverage, Edge Case]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK023 Are edge case requirements defined for albums with extremely long names (e.g., 500+ characters) beyond the truncation behavior? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK024 Are requirements specified for handling invalid or corrupted local file references in the photos table that differ from a simple missing file? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-014]
- [ ] CHK025 Are requirements defined for the first-time user experience when both albums and OPFS storage are empty? [Edge Case, Gap]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK026 Are accessibility requirements specified for the drag-and-drop interaction? [Gap, Non-Functional]
- [ ] CHK027 Are keyboard navigation requirements defined for the photo tile grid (focus order, selection, activation)? [Gap, Non-Functional]
- [ ] CHK028 Are performance degradation requirements defined when approaching the 100-album / 500-photos-per-album scale ceiling? [Clarity, Plan §Scale/Scope]
- [ ] CHK029 Are privacy requirements explicitly documented regarding what data (if any) is persisted outside the user's device? [Gap, Non-Functional, Plan §Constraints]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK030 Are the File System Access API availability assumptions validated with documented fallback behavior for unsupported browsers? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Technical Context]
- [ ] CHK031 Is the assumption "the application does not modify original photo files" traceable to a specific requirement? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK032 Are the supported image format assumptions (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF) validated against common device photo formats (e.g., HEIC on iOS)? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK033 Is the term "real time" in FR-019 defined with a latency bound? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-019]
- [ ] CHK034 Does the plan's "must work offline after initial page load" constraint conflict with the sql.js WASM loading requirement on first visit? [Conflict, Plan §Constraints]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline for items requiring spec/plan updates
- Items marked [Gap] indicate missing requirements that may need spec amendments
- Items marked [Ambiguity] or [Conflict] should be resolved before implementation begins
